LanguageData.WPS_ApplyPolicyDesc: Configure this wardrobe using a vanilla apparel policy.
LanguageData.WPS_ClearPolicyDesc: Remove the stored apparel policy from this wardrobe.
LanguageData.WPS_ReapplyPolicyDesc: Reload the current vanilla apparel policy and apply it again to this wardrobe.
LanguageData.WPS_PolicyStoredButNotApplied: Policy stored but could not be applied to the wardrobe filter: {0}
